results.title: Strictly Come Dancing' announces new hosts: Emma Willis, Josh Widdicombe, and Johannes Radebe
results.description: Strictly Come Dancing has revealed its new hosting trio. Emma Willis, Josh Widdicombe, and Johannes Radebe will take over presenting duties. All three expressed immense excitement for the upcoming seasons. Their undeniable chemistry has been highlighted by BBC executives. The new era of Strictly begins in Autumn 2026.

results.title: India drops to 6th in WTC table after Bangladesh sweeps Pakistan 2-0
results.description: India slips to sixth in the WTC rankings after Bangladesh's 2-0 series victory over Pakistan, now ranked fifth.
